body as reference"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="403" y="911" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="313" y="910" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="100" y="911" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
